mapper.sql:
SELECT T.ICKEY , T.ICNAME , CTG.CTGKEY , CTG.CTGNAME , SUM(T.BEFORE_IB_BOX_QTY) AS BEFORE_IB_BOX_QTY , SUM(T.BEFORE_IB_BOL_QTY) AS BEFORE_IB_BOL_QTY , SUM(T.BEFORE_IB_EA_QTY) AS BEFORE_IB_EA_QTY , SUM(T.BEFORE_OB_BOX_QTY) AS BEFORE_OB_BOX_QTY , SUM(T.BEFORE_OB_BOL_QTY) AS BEFORE_OB_BOL_QTY , SUM(T.BEFORE_OB_EA_QTY) AS BEFORE_OB_EA_QTY , SUM(T.TOT_BOX_QTY) AS TOT_BOX_QTY , SUM(T.TOT_BOL_QTY) AS TOT_BOL_QTY , SUM(T.TOT_EA_QTY) AS TOT_EA_QTY , SUM(T.AL_BOX_QTY) AS AL_BOX_QTY , SUM(T.AL_BOL_QTY) AS AL_BOL_QTY , SUM(T.AL_EA_QTY) AS AL_EA_QTY , SUM(T.AV_BOX_QTY) AS AV_BOX_QTY , SUM(T.AV_BOL_QTY) AS AV_BOL_QTY , SUM(T.AV_EA_QTY) AS AV_EA_QTY , SUM(T.HO_BOX_QTY) AS HO_BOX_QTY , SUM(T.HO_BOL_QTY) AS HO_BOL_QTY , SUM(T.HO_EA_QTY) AS HO_EA_QTY FROM ( /* 전일기준 */ SELECT BEF.ICKEY , BEF.ICNAME , BEF.CTGKEY , SUM(BEF.BEFORE_IB_BOX_QTY) AS BEFORE_IB_BOX_QTY , SUM(BEF.BEFORE_IB_BOL_QTY) AS BEFORE_IB_BOL_QTY , SUM(BEF.BEFORE_IB_EA_QTY) AS BEFORE_IB_EA_QTY , SUM(BEF.BEFORE_OB_BOX_QTY) AS BEFORE_OB_BOX_QTY , SUM(BEF.BEFORE_OB_BOL_QTY) AS BEFORE_OB_BOL_QTY , SUM(BEF.BEFORE_OB_EA_QTY) AS BEFORE_OB_EA_QTY , 0 AS TOT_BOX_QTY , 0 AS TOT_BOL_QTY , 0 AS TOT_EA_QTY , 0 AS AL_BOX_QTY , 0 AS AL_BOL_QTY , 0 AS AL_EA_QTY , 0 AS AV_BOX_QTY , 0 AS AV_BOL_QTY , 0 AS AV_EA_QTY , 0 AS HO_BOX_QTY , 0 AS HO_BOL_QTY , 0 AS HO_EA_QTY FROM ( /* 당월입고 BOX,BOL,EA */ SELECT ID.ICKEY , IC.ICNAME , IC.CTGKEY , DATE_TRUNC('day', SUM(CASE WHEN Id.UOM = 'BOX' THEN CD.CFQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END))::DATE AS BEFORE_IB_BOX_QTY , DATE_TRUNC('day', SUM(CASE WHEN Id.UOM = 'BOL' THEN CD.CFQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END))::DATE AS BEFORE_IB_BOL_QTY , DATE_TRUNC('day', SUM(CASE WHEN Id.UOM = 'EA' THEN CD.CFQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END))::DATE AS BEFORE_IB_EA_QTY , 0 AS BEFORE_OB_BOX_QTY , 0 AS BEFORE_OB_BOL_QTY , 0 AS BEFORE_OB_EA_QTY FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_HD IH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IB_DT ID ON IH.CTKEY = ID.CTKEY AND IH.OWKEY = ID.OWKEY AND IH.IBHDKEY = ID.IBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON ID.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND ID.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND ID.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IBCF_DT CD ON ID.CTKEY = CD.CTKEY AND ID.OWKEY = CD.OWKEY AND ID.IBHDKEY = CD.IBHDKEY AND ID.IBDTKEY = CD.IBDTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUT ON IH.CTKEY = ICUT.CTKEY AND ID.OWKEY = ICUT.OWKEY AND ID.ICUTKEY = ICUT.ICUTKEY AND ICUT.ICUTTYPE = ID.UOM WHERE ID.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND ID.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ID.WKSTATUS = '91' AND CD.IBCONFIRMDATE >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{searchDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYYMM') || '01000000' AND CD.IBCONFIRMDATE <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{searchDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '235959' GROUP BY ID.ICKEY, IC.ICNAME, IC.CTGKEY
UNION ALL
/* 당월출고 BOX,BOL,EA */ SELECT OD.ICKEY , IC.ICNAME , IC.CTGKEY , 0 AS BEFORE_IB_EA_QTY , 0 AS BEFORE_IB_BOL_QTY , 0 AS BEFORE_IB_EA_QTY , DATE_TRUNC('day', SUM(CASE WHEN OD.UOM = 'BOX' THEN OD.CFQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END))::DATE AS BEFORE_OB_BOX_QTY , DATE_TRUNC('day', SUM(CASE WHEN OD.UOM = 'BOL' THEN OD.CFQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END))::DATE AS BEFORE_OB_BOL_QTY , DATE_TRUNC('day', SUM(CASE WHEN OD.UOM = 'EA' THEN OD.CFQTY / ICUT.ICUTQTY ELSE 0 END))::DATE AS BEFORE_OB_EA_QTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON OD.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND OD.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUT ON OD.CTKEY = ICUT.CTKEY AND OD.OWKEY = ICUT.OWKEY AND OD.ICUTKEY = ICUT.ICUTKEY AND ICUT.ICUTTYPE = OD.UOM WHERE OD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.OBCONFIRMDATE >= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{searchDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYYMM') || '01000000' AND OH.OBCONFIRMDATE <= TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{searchDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '235959' AND OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY ) AND OD.WKSTATUS = '90' GROUP BY OD.ICKEY, IC.ICNAME, IC.CTGKEY ) BEF GROUP BY BEF.ICKEY, BEF.ICNAME, BEF.CTGKEY
UNION ALL
/* 현재고기준 */ SELECT IV.ICKEY , IV.ICNAME , IV.CTGKEY , 0 AS BEFORE_IB_BOX_QTY , 0 AS BEFORE_IB_BOL_QTY , 0 AS BEFORE_IB_EA_QTY , 0 AS BEFORE_OB_BOX_QTY , 0 AS BEFORE_OB_BOL_QTY , 0 AS BEFORE_OB_EA_QTY , SUM(IV.TOT_BOX_QTY) AS TOT_BOX_QTY , SUM(IV.TOT_BOL_QTY) AS TOT_BOL_QTY , SUM(IV.TOT_EA_QTY) AS TOT_EA_QTY , SUM(IV.AL_BOX_QTY) AS AL_BOX_QTY , SUM(IV.AL_BOL_QTY) AS AL_BOL_QTY , SUM(IV.AL_EA_QTY) AS AL_EA_QTY , SUM(IV.AV_BOX_QTY) AS AV_BOX_QTY , SUM(IV.AV_BOL_QTY) AS AV_BOL_QTY , SUM(IV.AV_EA_QTY) AS AV_EA_QTY , SUM(IV.HO_BOX_QTY) AS HO_BOX_QTY , SUM(IV.HO_BOL_QTY) AS HO_BOL_QTY , SUM(IV.HO_EA_QTY) AS HO_EA_QTY FROM ( WITH B AS ( SELECT IVAT.CTKEY, IVAT.OWKEY, IVAT.ICKEY, IVAT.CTGKEY, IVAT.ICNAME, IVAT.LCKEY, IVAT.IVATKEY , IVAT.TTQTY, IVAT.AVQTY, IVAT.ALQTY, IVAT.HOQTY , IVAT.ICUTKEY, IVAT.UOM, ICUT.ICUTQTY, ICUT2.ICUTQTY AS BOL_ICUTQTY FROM (SELECT IVAT.CTKEY, IVAT.OWKEY, IVAT.ICKEY, IC.ICNAME, IC.CTGKEY, IVAT.LCKEY, IVAT.IVATKEY, IC.ICUTKEY, IV.UOM , IVAT.TTQTY, IVAT.AVQTY, IVAT.ALQTY, IVAT.HOQTY FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC IVAT INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IV ON IVAT.CTKEY = IV.CTKEY AND IVAT.OWKEY = IV.OWKEY AND IVAT.ICKEY = IV.ICKEY AND IVAT.IVATKEY = IV.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON IVAT.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND IVAT.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND IVAT.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY AND IC.DELYN = 'N' WHERE IVAT.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IVAT.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IVAT.TTQTY > 0 ) IVAT INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUT ON IVAT.CTKEY = ICUT.CTKEY AND IVAT.OWKEY = ICUT.OWKEY AND IVAT.ICKEY = ICUT.ICUTKEY AND IVAT.UOM = ICUT.ICUTTYPE AND ICUT.OUTBOUNDUSEYN = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUT2 ON IVAT.CTKEY = ICUT2.CTKEY AND IVAT.OWKEY = ICUT2.OWKEY AND IVAT.ICKEY = ICUT2.ICUTKEY AND ICUT2.ICUTTYPE = 'BOL' AND ICUT2.OUTBOUNDUSEYN = 'Y' AND ICUT2.ICUTQTY > 0 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TWORK_MST_LC LC WHERE LC.CTKEY = IVAT.CTKEY AND LC.LCKEY = IVAT.LCKEY AND LC.LCTYPE = '90') )
SELECT B.ICKEY , B.ICNAME , B.CTGKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN B.UOM = 'BOX' THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', B.TTQTY/ B.ICUTQTY)::DATE ELSE 0 END) AS TOT_BOX_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN B.UOM = 'BOL' THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', B.TTQTY/ B.ICUTQTY)::DATE ELSE 0 END) AS TOT_BOL_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN B.UOM = 'EA' THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', B.TTQTY/ B.ICUTQTY)::DATE ELSE 0 END) AS TOT_EA_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN B.UOM = 'BOX' THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', B.ALQTY/ B.ICUTQTY)::DATE ELSE 0 END) AS AL_BOX_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN B.UOM = 'BOL' THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', B.ALQTY/ B.ICUTQTY)::DATE ELSE 0 END) AS AL_BOL_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN B.UOM = 'EA' THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', B.ALQTY/ B.ICUTQTY)::DATE ELSE 0 END) AS AL_EA_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN B.UOM = 'BOX' THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', B.AVQTY/ B.ICUTQTY)::DATE ELSE 0 END) AS AV_BOX_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN B.UOM = 'BOL' THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', B.AVQTY/ B.ICUTQTY)::DATE ELSE 0 END) AS AV_BOL_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN B.UOM = 'EA' THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', B.AVQTY/ B.ICUTQTY)::DATE ELSE 0 END) AS AV_EA_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN B.UOM = 'BOX' THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', B.HOQTY/ B.ICUTQTY)::DATE ELSE 0 END) AS HO_BOX_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN B.UOM = 'BOL' THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', B.HOQTY/ B.ICUTQTY)::DATE ELSE 0 END) AS HO_BOL_QTY , SUM(CASE WHEN B.UOM = 'EA' THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', B.HOQTY/ B.ICUTQTY)::DATE ELSE 0 END) AS HO_EA_QTY FROM B GROUP BY B.ICKEY, B.ICNAME, B.CTGKEY
UNION ALL
SELECT B.ICKEY , B.ICNAME , B.CTGKEY , 0 AS TOT_BOX_QTY , COALESCE(SUM(((B.TTQTY- (DATE_TRUNC('day', B.TTQTY / B.ICUTQTY)::DATE * B.ICUTQTY))) / B.BOL_ICUTQTY), 0) AS TOT_BOL_QTY , 0 AS TOT_EA_QTY , 0 AS AL_BOX_QTY , COALESCE(SUM(((B.ALQTY- (DATE_TRUNC('day', B.ALQTY / B.ICUTQTY)::DATE * B.ICUTQTY))) / B.BOL_ICUTQTY), 0) AS AL_BOL_QTY , 0 AS AL_EA_QTY , 0 AS AV_BOX_QTY , COALESCE(SUM(((B.AVQTY- (DATE_TRUNC('day', B.AVQTY / B.ICUTQTY)::DATE * B.ICUTQTY))) / B.BOL_ICUTQTY), 0) AS AV_BOL_QTY , 0 AS AV_EA_QTY , 0 AS HO_BOX_QTY , COALESCE(SUM(((B.HOQTY- (DATE_TRUNC('day', B.HOQTY / B.ICUTQTY)::DATE * B.ICUTQTY))) / B.BOL_ICUTQTY), 0) AS HO_BOL_QTY , 0 AS HO_EA_QTY FROM B WHERE MOD(B.TTQTY, B.ICUTQTY) > 0 AND MOD((B.TTQTY - (DATE_TRUNC('day', B.TTQTY / B.ICUTQTY)::DATE * B.ICUTQTY)), B.BOL_ICUTQTY) = 0 GROUP BY B.ICKEY, B.ICNAME, B.CTGKEY
UNION ALL
SELECT B.ICKEY , B.ICNAME , B.CTGKEY , 0 AS TOT_BOX_QTY , 0 AS TOT_BOL_QTY , COALESCE(SUM(((B.TTQTY- (DATE_TRUNC('day', B.TTQTY / B.ICUTQTY)::DATE * B.ICUTQTY))) / ICUT3.ICUTQTY), 0) AS TOT_EA_QTY , 0 AS AL_BOX_QTY , 0 AS AL_BOL_QTY , COALESCE(SUM(((B.ALQTY- (DATE_TRUNC('day', B.ALQTY / B.ICUTQTY)::DATE * B.ICUTQTY))) / ICUT3.ICUTQTY), 0) AS AL_EA_QTY , 0 AS AV_BOX_QTY , 0 AS AV_BOL_QTY , COALESCE(SUM(((B.AVQTY- (DATE_TRUNC('day', B.AVQTY / B.ICUTQTY)::DATE * B.ICUTQTY))) / ICUT3.ICUTQTY), 0) AS AV_EA_QTY , 0 AS HO_BOX_QTY , 0 AS HO_BOL_QTY , COALESCE(SUM(((B.HOQTY- (DATE_TRUNC('day', B.HOQTY / B.ICUTQTY)::DATE * B.ICUTQTY))) / ICUT3.ICUTQTY), 0) AS HO_EA_QTY FROM B LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICUT3 ON B.CTKEY = ICUT3.CTKEY AND B.OWKEY = ICUT3.OWKEY AND B.ICKEY = ICUT3.ICUTKEY AND ICUT3.ICUTTYPE = 'EA' WHERE MOD(B.TTQTY, B.ICUTQTY) > 0 AND MOD((B.TTQTY - (DATE_TRUNC('day', B.TTQTY / B.ICUTQTY)::DATE * B.ICUTQTY)), B.BOL_ICUTQTY) > 0 GROUP BY B.ICKEY, B.ICNAME, B.CTGKEY ) IV GROUP BY IV.ICKEY, IV.ICNAME, IV.CTGKEY ) T INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CTG CTG ON CTG.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND CTG.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND CTG.CTGLEVEL = '1' AND CTG.CTGKEY = SUBSTR(T.CTGKEY, 0, 10) GROUP BY T.ICKEY, T.ICNAME, CTG.CTGKEY, CTG.CTGNAME
mapper.select: /* wms-report-realTimeInvnSearch-sql-oracle.xml - selectRealTimeInvn*/ SELECT A.CTGKEY AS CTGKEY , A.CTGNAME AS CTGNAME , COUNT(A.ICKEY) AS SKU_CNT , SUM(A.BEFORE_IB_BOX_QTY) AS BEFORE_IB_BOX_QTY , SUM(A.BEFORE_IB_BOL_QTY) AS BEFORE_IB_BOL_QTY , SUM(A.BEFORE_IB_EA_QTY) AS BEFORE_IB_EA_QTY , SUM(A.BEFORE_OB_BOX_QTY) AS BEFORE_OB_BOX_QTY , SUM(A.BEFORE_OB_BOL_QTY) AS BEFORE_OB_BOL_QTY , SUM(A.BEFORE_OB_EA_QTY) AS BEFORE_OB_EA_QTY , SUM(A.TOT_BOX_QTY) AS TOT_BOX_QTY , SUM(A.TOT_BOL_QTY) AS TOT_BOL_QTY , SUM(A.TOT_EA_QTY) AS TOT_EA_QTY , SUM(A.AL_BOX_QTY) AS AL_BOX_QTY , SUM(A.AL_BOL_QTY) AS AL_BOL_QTY , SUM(A.AL_EA_QTY) AS AL_EA_QTY , SUM(A.AV_BOX_QTY) AS AV_BOX_QTY , SUM(A.AV_BOL_QTY) AS AV_BOL_QTY , SUM(A.AV_EA_QTY) AS AV_EA_QTY , SUM(A.HO_BOX_QTY) AS HO_BOX_QTY , SUM(A.HO_BOL_QTY) AS HO_BOL_QTY , SUM(A.HO_EA_QTY) AS HO_EA_QTY FROM ( ) A GROUP BY A.CTGKEY, A.CTGNAME ORDER BY A.CTGKEY
